Hard Knocks

Video.summary: Live from Hollywood, CA on January 24, 2019, Karate Combat: Hollywood kicks off Karate Combat's sophomore season. Held at the Avalon, the former Hollywood Palace building, near the famous intersection of Hollywood and Vine. Elhadji Ndour v. Calum Robb.
Video.grandparentTitle: KARATE COMBAT: HOLLYWOOD - Elhadji Ndour v. Calum Robb
Video.title: KARATE COMBAT: HOLLYWOOD - Elhadji Ndour v. Calum Robb

Video.summary: Out of the Cage reveals the private thoughts and emotions of an MMA fighter, the ambition that drives them and how they are affected when encountering defeat or facing triumph. Featuring Cody Purtell at HK52.

Video.summary: The School of Hard Knocks 28 filmed at the Spectra Place in Estevan. Professional and Amateur fighters from across North America battle it out in the cage. Derek Lapierre vs. Madison Mejia; Justin Hill vs. Cody Puls; Joshua Ferguson vs. Curtis Richard; Matthew McCormick vs. Lee Ruff.
Video.grandparentTitle: Fight Vault - HK28 - Episode 2
Video.title: Fight Vault - HK28 - Episode 2

Image.alt: Fight Vault - HK28 - Episode 2
Fight Vault - HK28 - Episode 2
Fight Vault - HK28 - Episode 2

Video.summary: The School of Hard Knocks 28 filmed at the Spectra Place in Estevan. Professional and Amateur fighters from across North America battle it out in the cage. Derek Daku vs. Allan Bogle; Mike Geib vs. Kevin Taylor; Ethan Cornect vs. Chris Wilson; Craig Gaudry vs. Meelad Hashtee; Christian Olson vs. Nic Grandbois.
